title: Simply Refined
description: Simply Refined is a carefully curated client-side pack focused on QoL improvements, beautiful visuals, and smooth performance.
body:
**Simply Refined** is a carefully curated client-side pack focused on QoL improvements, beautiful visuals, and smooth performance.

![Simply Refined Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/229fa5c6deeb3fc3a9cd883e078b2c30a52e7fa1_0.webp)

# ✨ Included Features

### 💡 QoL Improvements

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) adds useful food-related HUD improvements, displaying saturation, exhaustion, and food restoration information.
- [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) allows you to quickly re-validate your Minecraft session during `Invalid Session` errors when connecting to servers.
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) replaces Minecraft's default F3 menu with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.
- [Block Meter](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockmeter) allows you to measure areas with ease so you never have to count blocks manually again. Works perfectly with CalcMod!
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) allows customizable render distances further than the server's view-distance setting.
- [CalcMod](https://modrinth.com/plugin/calcmod) brings a simple and easy-to-use calculator in your chat with shortcuts designed for Minecraft.
- [Centered Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-crosshair) fixes a Minecraft bug where the crosshair isn't actually centered.
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) adds player heads to chat messages.
- [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort) brings simple inventory sorting while remaining light and non-intrusive.
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) adds a searchbar to your Controls settings so you can easily find a key binding in the menu.
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) allows you to play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window so you can easily use other applications while keeping the game open.
- [Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar-reconstructed) provides detailed information about your armor in the HUD.
- [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) allows you to host worlds, take and share screenshots more easily, and chat with other friends offline who also have Essential.
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) allows you to move your camera separately from your player within your render distance, which is useful for inspecting builds or taking screenshots.
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) displays information about what you're looking at in Minecraft.
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) adds a real-time map as you explore the world, with the ability to add custom waypoints.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) adds quality-of-life improvements related to languages.
- [Locator Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/locator-heads) adds player heads to the locator bar.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) allows you to view installed mods and adjust configurations.
- [Numeral Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/numeral-ping) replaces Minecraft's signal strength ping display with numeric values instead, allowing you to see exactly how much ping players have in servers.
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) allows you to interact with menus without waiting for resource packs to load when making changes.
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) allows you to record and replay your captured moments from a 3D perspective.
- [Scribble](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble) adds useful buttons to books, allowing you to format and change the color of text without worrying about the `§` symbol, and much more.
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) adds proximity voice chat capabilities to Minecraft if supported by the server.
- [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) adds VR support.
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) adds a highly customizable zoom key.

### 🌿 Aesthetics

- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) adds shader support and is compatible with OptiFine shaderpacks.
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) adds a warm and cozy vibe to your Minecraft world with unique visual elements for a vanilla feel.
- [Bliss Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader) adds a scenic fantasy feel to your Minecraft world.
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) automatically renders the second layer of player skins in 3D.
- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) makes sounds more immersive in your Minecraft world.
- [BetterGrassify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify) adds OptiFine's Fancy and Fast better grass implementation.
- [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus) adds dynamic blur to all GUIs to remove distractions and improve menu aesthetics.
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) adds support for connected textures.
- [Cool Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain) adds dynamic sounds to certain blocks during rainfall.
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) adds new particles to make explosions look better.
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) adds falling leaf particles to leaf blocks.
- [Immersive Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-hotbar) adds animations to your hotbar to make it more immersive and aesthetic when placing or picking up blocks, using tools or weapons, and scrolling in the hotbar.
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) adds real-time dynamic lights to torches, lanterns, and more.
- [Particle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-effects) adds uniquely textured particles for every effect in Minecraft.
- [Realistic Rain](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/realistic-rain) replaces the default rain sounds to be more realistic, including rain and splash textures, and adds new thunder sounds.
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) adds realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks, creating a highly immersive sound experience.
- [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) adds a variety of new sound effects to the UI, chat messages, in-game actions, and block sounds.
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) adds a variety of new particles for minor visual improvements.
- [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) adds realistic splashes and wakes on water.

### ⚡ Performance & Compatibility Mods

- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) adds optimizations to lightmap updates, sky color calculation, debug logic, and more.
- [Concurrent Chunk Management (C2ME)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) improves chunk performance.
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) adds controller support.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) reduces resource usage when Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) increases FPS by hiding entities that aren't visible using asynchronous path-tracing.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) optimizes memory usage.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) optimizes all immediate mode rendering using a custom buffer implementation.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) improves game logic optimization, including game physics, mob AI, block ticking, and more.
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) increases FPS by adjusting multiple types of culling to improve performance.
- [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore) improves performance and reduces lag spikes in Minecraft servers (can still provide some client-side benefits when connected to servers).
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) improves framerate, micro-stutter, and fixes several graphical issues in Minecraft, among other rendering optimizations.
- [Very Many Players (VMP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) improves server performance at high player counts (may still help clients on large servers).
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) adds support for OptiFine's Custom Entity Models (CEM).
- [[ESF] Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf) allows for entity sound variation using OptiFine format property rules.
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) adds new entity texture features, including entity and player skin features.

# ⭐ Planned Updates

- A custom wiki with a useful performance guide and FAQ
- A Lite version of Simply Refined for lower-end computers
- Backporting for **1.16.5 — 1.21.5**
